claims.claim: The Google Workspace CLI (gws) is published and actively maintained at github.com/googleworkspace/cli, distributed as a pre-built binary and via package managers.
gws forms create copies only info.title and info.documentTitle; all other fields (description, items, settings) are disallowed and must be added via batchUpdate.
claims.raw_snippet: Only the form.info.title and form.info.document_title fields are copied to the new form. All other fields including the form description, items and settings are disallowed.

claims.claim: Google Forms API v1 exposes exactly four methods on the forms resource: create, get, batchUpdate, setPublishSettings. There is no forms.update method.
Google Forms batchUpdate is POST https://forms.googleapis.com/v1/forms/{formId}:batchUpdate and takes a requests array of CreateItemRequest/UpdateItemRequest etc.

Israel's Privacy Protection Law Amendment 13 entered into force on 14 August 2025 and requires consent to be explicit and privacy notices to state what data is collected, why, and with whom it is shared.
